opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Tru-Flow has no booking button, no contact form, and is phone-only.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing calls in Boise go unanswered and convert to competitor bookings.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget capturing job type, urgency, and availability 24/7.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 76 Google reviews at 4.5 stars with no detected owner response patterns.
opportunities.observation: Skipping responses signals indifference to Boise customers and weakens local search ranking.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized review responses using AI trained on plumbing service context.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and contact is phone-only.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call leaves zero data trail, losing re-engagement opportunities permanently.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call logging that captures caller info, job type, and follow-up triggers automatically.
